calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And Catalina Structured Funding
Off Calendar Dec-28-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT JUSTIN BROWN's Petition For Approval For Transfer Of Structured Settlement Payment Rights By And Between Justin Brown And Catalina Structured Funding Inc. Pursuant to California Insuarnace Code section 10134, et seq. is Granted. No opposition filed and the petition complies with the California Insurance Code.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Reyes Hunter, CSR #6576, rhunter@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/AYSC)
